narration_text: Now we'll explore the various types of networks that make up our internet infrastructure. Notice that we have mobile networks, home networks, enterprise networks, and datacenter networks, each serving a specific purpose. Look at the diagram on your slide — notice how the different networks are interconnected, with end systems connecting to edge routers. I want you to focus on the diversity of these networks and how they're linked together. As we delve deeper into this topic, let's think about this together and consider how these networks enable us to access and share information seamlessly, which will lead us to discuss the importance of network architecture in our next topic.
